controls.title: Access Control Policy and Procedures
controls.description: The organization develops, documents, and disseminates access control policy and procedures.
controls.check_command: Check for container image access control policies
controls.remediation: Develop and implement formal access control policies for container images

controls.title: Account Management
controls.description: The organization manages information system accounts and associated access authorizations.
controls.remediation: Implement proper account management for container registries

controls.title: Access Enforcement
controls.description: The information system enforces approved authorizations for logical access to information.
controls.remediation: Enforce access controls at container runtime

controls.title: Information Flow Enforcement
controls.description: The information system enforces approved authorizations for controlling the flow of information.
controls.remediation: Implement network policies to control information flow

controls.title: Separation of Duties
controls.description: The organization separates duties of individuals to reduce risk of malevolent action.
controls.check_command: Check container development and deployment roles
controls.remediation: Implement separation of duties for container lifecycle

controls.title: Least Privilege
controls.description: The organization employs the principle of least privilege.
controls.remediation: Configure containers to run with least privilege

controls.title: Successful Logon and Access Attempts
controls.description: The information system warns the user of successful logon and access attempts.
controls.remediation: Enable logging of successful container access attempts

controls.title: Unsuccessful Logon and Access Attempts
controls.description: The information system displays appropriate warnings for unsuccessful logon attempts.
controls.remediation: Enable logging of unsuccessful container access attempts

controls.title: Remote Access
controls.description: The organization authorizes, monitors, and controls remote access to the information system.
controls.remediation: Implement proper remote access controls for containers

controls.title: Access Control for Mobile Devices
controls.description: The organization authorizes, monitors, and controls access to the information system from mobile devices.
controls.check_command: Check mobile device access to containers
controls.remediation: Implement mobile device access controls for containers

controls.title: System and Communications Protection Policy and Procedures
controls.description: The organization develops, documents, and disseminates system and communications protection policy.
controls.remediation: Develop container runtime security policies

controls.title: System and Communications Protection Policy and Procedures
controls.description: The information system separates user functionality from system management functionality.
controls.remediation: Separate user and management functions in containers

controls.title: Security Function Isolation
controls.description: The information system isolates security functions from non-security functions.
controls.remediation: Isolate security functions in container runtime

controls.title: Information in Shared Resources
controls.description: The information system prevents unauthorized and unintended information transfer.
controls.remediation: Implement protection for shared container resources

controls.title: Boundary Protection
controls.description: The information system monitors and controls communications at the external boundary.
controls.remediation: Implement network boundary protection for containers

controls.title: Transmission Confidentiality and Integrity
controls.description: The information system protects the confidentiality and integrity of transmitted information.
controls.remediation: Implement encryption for container communications

controls.title: Cryptographic Key Establishment and Management
controls.description: The information system establishes and manages cryptographic keys.
controls.remediation: Implement proper key management for containers

controls.title: Use of Cryptography
controls.description: The information system uses cryptography to protect information.
controls.remediation: Implement appropriate cryptography in containers

controls.title: Collaborative Computing Devices
controls.description: The information system prohibits remote activation of collaborative computing devices.
controls.remediation: Restrict collaborative computing in containers

controls.title: Transmission of Security and Privacy Attributes
controls.description: The information system associates security and privacy attributes with information.
controls.remediation: Implement security attribute transmission for containers

controls.title: Mobile Code
controls.description: The information system identifies, prohibits, or restricts mobile code.
controls.remediation: Restrict or prohibit mobile code in containers

controls.title: Secure Name/Address Resolution Service
controls.description: The information system provides name/address resolution service for authorized users.
controls.remediation: Implement secure DNS for containers

controls.title: Secure Name/Address Resolution Service for Authoritative Sources
controls.description: The information system performs name/address resolution for authoritative sources.
controls.remediation: Use authoritative DNS for containers

controls.title: System and Communications Protection Policy and Procedures
controls.description: The information system protects the confidentiality and integrity of transmitted information.
controls.remediation: Implement transmission protection for containers

controls.title: Session Authenticity
controls.description: The information system protects the authenticity of communications sessions.
controls.remediation: Implement session authentication for containers

controls.title: Fail-Safe Procedures
controls.description: The information system fails to a known secure state when system processes fail.
controls.remediation: Implement fail-safe procedures for containers

controls.title: Protection of Information at Rest
controls.description: The information system protects the confidentiality and integrity of information at rest.
controls.remediation: Implement encryption for data at rest in containers

controls.title: Concealment and Misleading Activities
controls.description: The information system conceals or misleads unauthorized users.
controls.remediation: Implement concealment techniques for containers

controls.title: Covert Channel Analysis
controls.description: The information system protects against covert channels.
controls.remediation: Implement covert channel protection for containers

controls.title: System Partitioning
controls.description: The information system partitions information system resources into separately secured domains.
controls.remediation: Implement system partitioning for containers

controls.title: Originating Traffic Control
controls.description: The information system allows only authorized traffic to originate from the system.
controls.remediation: Implement outbound traffic control for containers

controls.title: Inbound Traffic Control
controls.description: The information system allows only authorized inbound traffic.
controls.remediation: Implement inbound traffic control for containers

controls.title: Distributed Processing
controls.description: The information system distributes processing across components.
controls.remediation: Implement distributed processing for containers

controls.title: Outbound Connections
controls.description: The information system limits outbound connections.
controls.remediation: Limit outbound connections from containers

controls.title: Process Isolation
controls.description: The information system isolates processes from each other.
controls.remediation: Implement process isolation for containers

controls.title: Wireless Link Protection
controls.description: The information system protects wireless links.
controls.remediation: Implement wireless link protection for containers

controls.title: Port and I/O Device Access
controls.description: The information system restricts port and I/O device access.
controls.check_command: Check container port and I/O restrictions
controls.remediation: Restrict port and I/O access for containers

controls.title: Authenticator Management
controls.description: The information system manages authenticators.
controls.remediation: Implement authenticator management for containers

controls.title: Configuration Management Policy and Procedures
controls.description: The organization develops, documents, and disseminates configuration management policy.
controls.remediation: Develop container configuration management policies

controls.title: Baseline Configuration
controls.description: The organization develops, documents, and maintains baseline configurations.
controls.remediation: Establish baseline configurations for containers

controls.title: Configuration Change Control
controls.description: The organization controls changes to configuration items.
controls.remediation: Implement configuration change control for containers

controls.title: Security Impact Analysis
controls.description: The organization analyzes security impact of changes.
controls.remediation: Implement security impact analysis for container changes

controls.title: Access Restrictions for Change
controls.description: The organization restricts access to configuration items.
controls.remediation: Restrict access to container configurations

controls.title: Configuration Settings
controls.description: The organization configures security settings.
controls.remediation: Configure appropriate security settings for containers

controls.title: Least Functionality
controls.description: The organization disables or removes unnecessary functions.
controls.remediation: Implement least functionality in containers

controls.title: Information System Component Inventory
controls.description: The organization maintains an inventory of information system components.
controls.remediation: Maintain inventory of container components

controls.title: Configuration Management Plan
controls.description: The organization develops and implements a configuration management plan.
controls.remediation: Develop container configuration management plan

controls.title: Software Usage Restrictions
controls.description: The organization restricts software usage.
controls.remediation: Implement software usage restrictions for containers

controls.title: User-Installed Software
controls.description: The organization controls user-installed software.
controls.remediation: Control user-installed software in containers

controls.title: Information System Component Inventory
controls.description: The organization maintains an inventory of information system components.
controls.remediation: Maintain inventory of container components

controls.title: Audit and Accountability Policy and Procedures
controls.description: The organization develops, documents, and disseminates audit policy.
controls.remediation: Develop container audit policies

controls.title: Audit Events
controls.description: The information system generates audit records.
controls.remediation: Implement audit event generation for containers

controls.title: Content of Audit Records
controls.description: The organization includes audit record content.

controls.title: Audit Storage Capacity
controls.description: The information system provides sufficient audit storage capacity.

controls.title: Response to Audit Processing Failures
controls.description: The information system responds to audit processing failures.
controls.remediation: Implement audit failure response for containers

controls.title: Audit Review, Analysis, and Reporting
controls.description: The organization reviews and analyzes audit records.

controls.remediation: Implement audit review and analysis for containers

controls.title: Audit Reduction and Report Generation
controls.description: The information system provides audit reduction and report generation.

controls.remediation: Implement audit reduction and reporting for containers

controls.title: Time Stamps
controls.description: The information system uses time stamps for audit records.
controls.remediation: Implement time stamps for container audit records

controls.title: Protection of Audit Information
controls.description: The information system protects audit information.
controls.remediation: Protect container audit information

controls.title: Non-Repudiation
controls.description: The information system provides non-repudiation.
controls.remediation: Implement non-repudiation for containers

controls.title: Audit Record Retention
controls.description: The organization retains audit records.
controls.remediation: Implement audit record retention for containers

controls.title: Audit Generation
controls.description: The information system generates audit records.
controls.remediation: Implement audit generation for containers

controls.title: Monitoring for Unauthorized Disclosure
controls.description: The organization monitors for unauthorized disclosure.
controls.remediation: Implement disclosure monitoring for containers

controls.title: Session Audit
controls.description: The information system audits session establishment.
controls.remediation: Implement session auditing for containers

controls.title: Alternate Audit Capability
controls.description: The information system provides alternate audit capability.
controls.remediation: Implement alternate audit capability for containers

controls.title: Cross-Discipline Audit Sharing
controls.description: The organization shares audit information across disciplines.

controls.description: The organization provides incident response training.

controls.description: The organization provides incident response support.
